title: Boats Motion Rework (Climb Stairs, Slabs, and Ice)
description: Datapack that allows for Boats and Minecarts to travel up stairs, slabs, and Ice for ice boat racing
body:
This datapack lets boats and minecarts climb stairs. This will transport all minecart types and all mobs that are in the boats as well. Chest boats are now compatible!

This pack is used to make boats travel up ice blocks as seen in ice boat racing videos! Buttery smooth motion!

[Watch this video for the How to Use](https://packaged-media.redd.it/lq9xeixv0ge71/pb/m2-res_720p.mp4?m=DASHPlaylist.mpd&v=1&s=91d56601cf14227f454664bd29fe2af50d787ecc)

Place it in your datapacks folder, and have fun! 100% multiplayer compatible!
